---
title: "„Historische“ Königsinschrift"
---

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="0.9"
    onclick="setZoom(0.9)"
  >A−</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1"
    onclick="setZoom(1)"
  >A</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1.2"
    onclick="setZoom(1.2)"
  >A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  const baseFontSize = 16;
  const baseGlyphHeight = 30;
  const baseGlyphRowGap = 7.2;

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--base-scale",
    String(scale)
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--site-font-size",
    `${baseFontSize * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-height",
    `${baseGlyphHeight * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-row-gap",
    `${baseGlyphRowGap * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem(
    "site-zoom",
    String(scale)
  );

  document
    .querySelectorAll(".zoom-controls button")
    .forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle(
        "active",
        Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
      );
    });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem("site-zoom") || 1
  );

  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```

[Datum](../slots/datum.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-datum} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0001_xr Hm n_01.png){.glyph} *ḫr ḥm n* [König](../slots/koenig.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-k-nig} <b>[narrativer Text]</b>   




## Übersetzung

[Datum](../slots/datum.qmd){.slot-link .slot-datum} unter der Majestät / Regierung des [König](../slots/koenig.qmd){.slot-link .slot-k-nig}s

## Kommentar

nach *ḫr ḥm n*: Thronname des Königs

## Schreibvarianten

::: {.glyphvariants-block}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*[ḫr] ḥm n*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400036' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 400036' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 400036 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>400036</a><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/104690' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 104690' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 104690 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>104690</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0001_xr Hm n_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0010_xr Hm n_02.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0020_Hm n_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0030_Hm n_02.png){.glyph}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*nsw bit*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/88060' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 88060' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 88060 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>88060</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0001_nsw-bit_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0010_nsw-bit_02.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0020_nsw-bit_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0030_nsw-bit_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0040_nsw-bit_NR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0050_nsw-bit_NR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0060_nsw-bit_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0070_nsw-bit_Gr_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0080_nsw-bit_Gr_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0090_nsw-bit_Gr_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>


:::





```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  root.style.setProperty('--base-scale', String(scale));

  /*
   * Explicitly resize glyphs and row spacing.
   * Base glyph height: 30px
   * Base row gap: 7.2px
   */
  root.style.setProperty(
    '--glyph-height',
    `${30 * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    '--glyph-row-gap',
    `${7.2 * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', String(scale));

  document.querySelectorAll('.zoom-controls button').forEach(button => {
    button.classList.toggle(
      'active',
      Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
    );
  });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem('site-zoom') || 1
  );

  /*
   * Call the complete function here.
   * Do not restore only --base-scale, because the glyph-specific
   * variables must also be restored.
   */
  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```
